title: Sankagiri Fort
tagline: Sankagiri Fort — heritage city of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Sankagiri Fort is a historical fort maintained by the Archaeological Survey of India.
overview.description: Sankagiri Fort is a historical fort maintained by the Archaeological Survey of India. It is located 22 km from the city of Erode and 38 km from Salem. Sankari or Sankagiri is the town located around this place. The fort is 707 meters (2319.6 feet) high and covers an area of 558.58 acres.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Holy Trinity Church, Yercaud
topPlaces.description: CSI Holy Trinity Church in Yercaud, Tamil Nadu, India was built in 1834 and was rebuilt in 1853 after a damaging accident. It belongs to the Church of South India Trust Association.

topPlaces.name: Yercaud taluk
topPlaces.description: Yercaud taluk is a taluk of Salem district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Yercaud.

topPlaces.name: Yercaud block
topPlaces.description: Yercaud block is a revenue block of Salem district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. This revenue block consists 9 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Yercaud
topPlaces.description: Yercaud, also spelt Erkad, is a town and hill station in Salem District in Tamil Nadu, India. Located in Servarayan Hills in the Eastern Ghats, it is situated at an altitude of 1,515 m (4,970 ft).

topPlaces.name: Kiliyur Falls
topPlaces.description: Kiliyur Falls is a waterfall on the Periyaaru river in the Servarayan hill range in the Eastern Ghats, Tamil Nadu, India. The waters overflowing the Yercaud Lake fall 91 m (300 ft) into the Kiliyur Valley.

topPlaces.name: Kurumbapatti Zoological Park
topPlaces.description: The Kurumbapatti Zoological Park is a second largest zoo in Tamil Nadu next to Arignar Anna Zoological Park, situated in the foothills of the Shervaroyan Hills, 10 km from Salem, Tamil Nadu, India. It was set up in 1981 as a small museum and was later extended to 69 Ha.

topPlaces.name: Kannankurichi
topPlaces.description: Kannankurichi is a panchayat town in Salem taluk of Salem district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is one of the 31 panchayat towns in the district.

topPlaces.name: Mookaneri Lake
topPlaces.description: Mookaneri Lake, also called Kannankurichi Lake, is a lake in Kannankurichi, in the Salem Taluk of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, that covers an area of 23.5 hectares (58 acres). It is located to the south of the Shevaroy Hills and is a major body of water in Salem.

itinerary.title: Day 1 — Holy Trinity Church, Yercaud & around

items.note: CSI Holy Trinity Church in Yercaud, Tamil Nadu, India was built in 1834 and was rebuilt in 1853 after a damaging accident. It belongs to the Church of South India Trust Association.
Yercaud taluk is a taluk of Salem district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Yercaud.
Yercaud block is a revenue block of Salem district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. This revenue block consists 9 panchayat villages.
Yercaud, also spelt Erkad, is a town and hill station in Salem District in Tamil Nadu, India. Located in Servarayan Hills in the Eastern Ghats, it is situated at an altitude of 1,515 m (4,970 ft).

Kiliyur Falls is a waterfall on the Periyaaru river in the Servarayan hill range in the Eastern Ghats, Tamil Nadu, India. The waters overflowing the Yercaud Lake fall 91 m (300 ft) into the Kiliyur Valley.

The Kurumbapatti Zoological Park is a second largest zoo in Tamil Nadu next to Arignar Anna Zoological Park, situated in the foothills of the Shervaroyan Hills, 10 km from Salem, Tamil Nadu, India. It was set up in 1981 as a small museum and was later extended to 69 Ha.
Kannankurichi is a panchayat town in Salem taluk of Salem district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is one of the 31 panchayat towns in the district.

Mookaneri Lake, also called Kannankurichi Lake, is a lake in Kannankurichi, in the Salem Taluk of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu, that covers an area of 23.5 hectares (58 acres). It is located to the south of the Shevaroy Hills and is a major body of water in Salem.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sankagiri Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sankagiri Fort is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sankagiri Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (125 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (120 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sankagiri Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sankagiri Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sankagiri Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Sankagiri Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sankagiri Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Holy Trinity Church, Yercaud, Yercaud taluk, Yercaud block, Yercaud, Kiliyur Falls.
